title: OpenSkillTree YAML Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating OpenSkillTree YAML contribution files. All files under data/skills/**/*.yaml must conform to this schema.

PathId.description: Hierarchical path ID using lowercase alphanumeric + hyphen segments separated by slashes, e.g. 'sports/pickleball', 'creative-arts/photography', or 'sports/pickleball/serve'.

RelationshipType.description: requires: target cannot be attempted without source. enables: source makes target accessible. component-of: source is a sub-skill composing target. complementary: mutual reinforcement. variant-of: parallel approaches.

Domain.description: Top-level domain taxonomy (V1 fixed list). New domains require a GitHub Discussion tagged 'domain-proposal'.

id.description: Tree-level path ID, e.g. 'sports/pickleball'. Must be globally unique across all trees.

title.description: Display name of the resource (e.g., 'CS50P Lecture 0: Functions').

type.description: Type of resource for icon display.

criteria.description: Human-readable description of what mastery looks like at this level.

metrics.description: Optional quantitative targets that can be measured (e.g., '≥ 60% first-serve %').

resources.description: Tutorials, videos, courses, or tools to help reach this level.

practice.description: Specific drills, exercises, or practice routines with time estimates.

projects.description: Concrete things to build, achieve, or demonstrate at this level.

tips.description: Common mistakes and how to avoid them.

id.description: Node-level path ID, e.g. 'sports/pickleball/serve'. Must be globally unique.

benchmarks.description: At least one benchmark is required for a node to be considered complete.

icon.description: Optional Lucide icon name, emoji, or image URL.

tags.description: Optional free-text tags for filtering and discovery.

source.description: Path ID of the source node. Must exist in the nodes array.

target.description: Path ID of the target node. Must exist in the nodes array.

note.description: Optional human-readable note explaining the relationship.
